title: FormatInteger — unbounded integer falls back to float64 (8 bytes)
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatInteger (number branded {integer:true}, no min/max); with no bounds to narrow the width, binary falls back to a full float64 (8 bytes) and JSON writes the plain number. Samples include MAX_SAFE_INTEGER / MIN_SAFE_INTEGER.
notes: No bounds → no width optimization: binary uses float64 8 bytes regardless of value (getBinaryByteSizes [8,8,8]); safe-integer extremes still round-trip losslessly in both JSON and binary.
